description: Refactor workflow — plan, write characterization tests first (via agentwright test-coverage pipeline), refactor (peers), verify behavior unchanged via full audit pipeline, update docs.

phases.name: refactor-plan-review
phases.summary: Refactor plan + plan-quality-review findings ready. User reviews. Resume to write characterization tests then dispatch the refactor to peers.

phases.name: refactor
phases.directive: Refactor per artifacts/plan.md. Behavior MUST remain identical — the characterization tests above must continue to pass. Decompose into independent tasks (per module/file scope) and dispatch to peers, or run yourself if none available.
